title: Anthropic Just Warned Everyone About Claude (It’s Evolving)
summary: Anthropic has warned that Claude is increasingly automating software engineering and AI research tasks, including code writing, code review, and experiment execution. Both Anthropic and OpenAI have raised concerns about accelerating AI self-improvement cycles where AI systems play growing roles in building better AI systems.
